incorrect.source_says: DMEM/F-12 is the iPSC maintenance medium, not the organoid base medium; organoids use HM/EM/DM whose composition is in Supplementary Table S1
incorrect.evidence_quote: The iPSC colonies were picked and maintained on a γ-irradiated mouse embryonic fibroblast feeder layer in DMEM/F-12 medium (Thermo Fisher) ... The medium composition is described in detail in Supplementary Table S1.

incorrect.source_says: collagenase type IV at 1:5–10 is the iPSC weekly passaging; ORGANOID passaging is mechanical splitting with a surgical blade at a 1:3–1:5 ratio
incorrect.evidence_quote: fully enlarged organoids were mechanically split with surgical blade and then passaged weekly at a ratio of 1:3–1:5

recall_misses.item: Full differentiation timeline (Day 0 iPSC → Day 3 Definitive Endoderm → Day 9 Hepatic Endoderm → Day 13 HE → organoid generation → Day 20~ hLO)
recall_misses.source_says: Schematic timeline with stage day-marks; timeline[] in extraction is empty
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Day 0 iPSC; 3 Definitive Endoderm; 9 Hepatic Endoderm; HE 13; Organoid generation; hLO 20~ (Fig 1a schematic); caption: 'Schematic diagram of the previous (upper) and new (lower) protocols to generate iPSC-derived expandable liver organoids'

recall_misses.item: Differentiation maturation timeline: Day 0–3 EM + BMP7, Day 3–9 DM
recall_misses.source_says: HM-cultured organoids in EM+BMP7 for 3 days then DM for 6 additional days; confirmed by Fig 2f schematic (Day 0–1/3 EM+BMP7, Day 3–9 DM)
recall_misses.evidence_quote: HM-cultured organoids were incubated in EM supplemented with 25 ng/ml BMP7 (PeproTech) for 3 days and then in differentiation medium DM for an additional 6 days

recall_misses.item: Y-27632 added for 3 days during organoid generation
recall_misses.source_says: duration of ROCK inhibitor treatment (3 days) not captured
recall_misses.evidence_quote: 10 µM Y-27632 (Tocris) was added for 3 days to improve viability
Three-dimensional liver organoids formed in 3–5 days

recall_misses.item: Single-cell dissociation at day 13 of differentiation (HE stage) is the key protocol modification anchoring the timeline
recall_misses.source_says: captured under modifications[] but not as a timeline stage
recall_misses.evidence_quote: cells were detached and dissociated into single cells using TrypLE™ Express Enzyme (Thermo Fisher) after HE induction at day 13 of differentiation

recall_misses.item: Media defined in protocol (HM hepatic medium, EM expansion medium, DM differentiation medium, MH mature-hepatocyte medium)
recall_misses.source_says: named media systems and their roles not captured as base_media/conditions
recall_misses.evidence_quote: A. MH (mature hepatocyte medium); B. MH (3D); C. HM (hepatic medium); D. EM (expansion medium); E. DM (differentiation medium)

notes: Extracted reagents/doses (bFGF 10 ng/ml, BMP7 25 ng/ml, Y-27632 10 µM, Matrigel, iPSC source) are all verbatim-correct, but the empty timeline[] is a major omission: methods and Fig 1a/2f schematics give a complete staged timeline (DE d3, HE d9/d13, organoid d20~, EM+BMP7 d0–3, DM d3–9). DMEM/F-12 and collagenase passaging are conflated from the iPSC-maintenance section rather than the organoid medium (Suppl. Table S1, not in bundle).
